mapper.sql: ModelNo, length, width, height, weight, netweight, AfterPackaging_length, AfterPackaging_width, AfterPackaging_height, CylDiameter, Cylminlen, Cylmaxlen, MSizeMin, MSizeMax, MidSize, is_deleted, created_date, created_user, updated_date, updated_user
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.product_physics_t
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.product_physics_t (ModelNo, length, width, height, weight, netweight, AfterPackaging_length, AfterPackaging_width, AfterPackaging_height, CylDiameter, Cylminlen, Cylmaxlen, MSizeMin, MSizeMax, MidSize, is_deleted, created_date, created_user, updated_date, updated_user ) values (#{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{length,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{width,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{height,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{netweight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{afterpackagingLength,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{afterpackagingWidth,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{afterpackagingHeight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cyldiameter,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cylminlen,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cylmaxlen,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{msizemin,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{msizemax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{midsize,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

insert into dbo.product_physics_t
ModelNo,
length,
width,
height,
weight,
netweight,
AfterPackaging_length,
AfterPackaging_width,
AfterPackaging_height,
CylDiameter,
Cylminlen,
Cylmaxlen,

MSizeMax,
MidSize,
is_deleted,
created_date,
created_user,
updated_date,
updated_user,

mapper.update:
update dbo.product_physics_t
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
length = #{record.length,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
width = #{record.width,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
height = #{record.height,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
netweight = #{record.netweight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
AfterPackaging_length = #{record.afterpackagingLength,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
AfterPackaging_width = #{record.afterpackagingWidth,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
AfterPackaging_height = #{record.afterpackagingHeight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
CylDiameter = #{record.cyldiameter,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Cylminlen = #{record.cylminlen,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Cylmaxlen = #{record.cylmaxlen,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
MSizeMin = #{record.msizemin,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
MSizeMax = #{record.msizemax,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
MidSize = #{record.midsize,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_deleted = #{record.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},
created_date = #{record.createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
created_user = #{record.createdUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updated_date = #{record.updatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_user = #{record.updatedUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.product_physics_t set ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, length = #{record.length,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, width = #{record.width,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, height = #{record.height,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, netweight = #{record.netweight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, AfterPackaging_length = #{record.afterpackagingLength,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, AfterPackaging_width = #{record.afterpackagingWidth,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, AfterPackaging_height = #{record.afterpackagingHeight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, CylDiameter = #{record.cyldiameter,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Cylminlen = #{record.cylminlen,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Cylmaxlen = #{record.cylmaxlen,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, MSizeMin = #{record.msizemin,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, MSizeMax = #{record.msizemax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, MidSize = #{record.midsize,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_deleted = #{record.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, created_date = #{record.createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, created_user = #{record.createdUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_date = #{record.updatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_user = #{record.updatedUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.product_physics_t
length = #{length,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
width = #{width,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
height = #{height,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
netweight = #{netweight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
AfterPackaging_length = #{afterpackagingLength,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
AfterPackaging_width = #{afterpackagingWidth,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
AfterPackaging_height = #{afterpackagingHeight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
CylDiameter = #{cyldiameter,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Cylminlen = #{cylminlen,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Cylmaxlen = #{cylmaxlen,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
MSizeMin = #{msizemin,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
MSizeMax = #{msizemax,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
MidSize = #{midsize,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},
created_date = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
created_user = #{createdUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updated_date = #{updatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_user = #{updatedUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.product_physics_t set length = #{length,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, width = #{width,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, height = #{height,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, netweight = #{netweight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, AfterPackaging_length = #{afterpackagingLength,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, AfterPackaging_width = #{afterpackagingWidth,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, AfterPackaging_height = #{afterpackagingHeight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, CylDiameter = #{cyldiameter,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Cylminlen = #{cylminlen,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Cylmaxlen = #{cylmaxlen,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, MSizeMin = #{msizemin,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, MSizeMax = #{msizemax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, MidSize = #{midsize,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, created_date = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, created_user = #{createdUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_date = #{updatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_user = #{updatedUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
